tasks.label: Compilar ERP 2.0
args: $files = Get-ChildItem 'src' -Recurse -Filter *.java | ForEach-Object FullName; & javac --module-path 'C:/javafx-sdk-24.0.1/lib' --add-modules javafx.controls,javafx.fxml -cp 'lib/*;lib/sincronizador/*' -d 'bin' $files; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'bin/erp/view' -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'src/erp/view/*' -Destination 'bin/erp/view' -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'src/interfaces' -Destination 'bin' -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'src/app.properties' -Destination 'bin' -Force
